zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bardolf於1125年出生在英國林可爾史爾格亞特 卡爾頓時，他的父親Hamelin Bardolf11歲，母親Mrs Hamelin Bardolf9歲。他於大約1144年與Amabilia De Lindsay在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1174年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布拉德維爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bardolf于1125年出生在英国林可爾史爾格亞特 卡爾頓时，他的父亲Hamelin Bardolf11岁，母亲Mrs Hamelin Bardolf9岁。他于大约1144年与Amabilia De Lindsay在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1174年在英国英格兰諾福爾可布拉德維爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bardolf was born in 1125, in Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Hamelin Bardolf, was 11 and his mother, Mrs Hamelin Bardolf, was 9. He married Amabilia De Lindsay about 1144, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. He died in 1174, in Bradwell, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bardolf est né en 1125, à Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamelin Bardolf, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Mrs Hamelin Bardolf, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Amabilia De Lindsay environ 1144, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé en 1174, à Bradwell, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bardolf 1125 in Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamelin Bardolf 11 und seine Mutter Mrs Hamelin Bardolf 9. Er hat um 1144 in Lincolnshire, England Amabilia De Lindsay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb 1174 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Bradwell, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bardolf è nato il nel 1125 nel Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Hamelin Bardolf, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Hamelin Bardolf, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Amabilia De Lindsay circa 1144, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1174, nel Bradwell, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bardolfが1125年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグレアト カールトンで生まれた時，父Hamelin Bardolfは11歳，母Mrs Hamelin Bardolfは9歳であった。約1144年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでAmabilia De Lindsayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブラドウエルで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bardolf(이)가 1125년 영국 링코실르 그리트 칼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamelin Bardolf(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Hamelin Bardolf(은)는 9세였다. 그는 대략 1144년 영국 링코실르에서 Amabilia De Lindsay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브라드웰에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bardolf nasceu em 1125, em Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamelin Bardolf, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Hamelin Bardolf, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabilia De Lindsay aproximadamente 1144, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1174, em Bradwell, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bardolf родился в 1125 г. в местности грит карлтон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamelin Bardolf было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Hamelin Bardolf, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilia De Lindsay около 1144 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер в 1174 г. в местности брадвелл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bardolf nació en 1125, en Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamelin Bardolf, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Mrs Hamelin Bardolf, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Amabilia De Lindsay aproximadamente 1144, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1174, en Bradwell, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
